title: JPCH Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 03 Junior Resident Posts
description: The Jag Pravesh Chandra Hospital (JPCH) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the 03 vacancies for Junior Resident Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the MBBS can grab this chance and apply for the JPCH Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salarystructure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
